typed_hook: The wrong detail becomes a rule.
typed_narration: Every time the child blinks, one more classmate forgets the child's name.
final_hook_sentence: The teacher still calls attendance, but the child's line is now blank.
reader_retention_goal: Keep the reader tracking how the rule is spreading.
visual_memory_point: an attendance sheet with one erased line
threat_delta: The anomaly spreads from an object to other people.
technique_notes: horror_escalation makes the threat more specific
